queries.query: Shape the 'Dark Mode' idea for me
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; explicit shape verb against a captured idea.

queries.query: I want to prepare this for the next wave
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; wave preparation implies shaping the brief first.

queries.query: Refine these three ideas
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; 'refine' is the canonical arc-shape verb.

queries.query: Flesh out the SSO idea so it's ready for spec
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'flesh out' maps to idea refinement.

queries.query: Work up a proper brief for the CSV export request
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'work up a brief' is adjacent to shape.

queries.query: Let's dig into the 'weekly digest' idea and size it up
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'dig into' plus 'size it up' is shape-intent.

queries.query: Turn the captured auth-bug idea into a spec-ready brief
queries.rationale: Shape surface — explicit captured → spec-ready transition.

queries.query: I need a problem statement and success criteria for the dark-mode idea
queries.rationale: Shape surface — brief fields enumerated triggers refinement.

queries.query: Tighten up the onboarding-tour idea before we plan next cycle
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'tighten up' before planning is shape.

queries.query: Run the shaping subagents on the top three captured items
queries.rationale: Shape surface — direct reference to parallel subagent analysis.

queries.query: Just record this quick thought
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-capture (Appendix A); raw capture only.

queries.query: Write the detailed spec for this feature
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to /cw-spec (Appendix A); spec authoring lives downstream of shape.

queries.query: Plan the next wave with the already-shaped ideas
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-wave; grouping shaped ideas, not shaping one.

queries.query: Audit the pipeline for incomplete briefs
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-audit; diagnostic sweep across briefs, not authoring a brief.

queries.query: Jot down the idea the user just asked about
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-capture; raw capture phrasing.

queries.query: Ship this already-validated feature to archive
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-ship; lifecycle completion, not refinement.

queries.query: What's the status of the pipeline?
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-status; read-only pulse, not shape.

queries.query: Update the README to mention dark-mode support
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-sync; README management, not brief authoring.

queries.query: Implement the dark-mode UI in the settings panel
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; engineering implementation, not product shaping.

queries.query: Create three new Jira tickets from these captured ideas
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; ticket creation in external tool, not Arc shape.
